nameEn: IEEE International Parallel and Distributed Processing Symposium
description: A major IEEE conference on parallel and distributed processing, covering large-scale parallel algorithms, distributed systems, and HPC applications. It hosts numerous co-located workshops providing broad coverage of current trends, and is a key venue in parallel and distributed processing.

bestPapers.paperTitle: Performance-Portable Multiphase Flow Solutions with Discontinuous Galerkin Methods
Enabling Efficient Error-controlled Lossy Compression for Unstructured Scientific Data
bestPapers.authors: Wu, Di, Ren, Jiao, Xia, Wang, Guo, Liang & Cappello

descriptionKo: 병렬 및 분산 처리를 종합적으로 다루는 IEEE 학회로, 대규모 병렬 알고리즘, 분산 시스템, HPC 응용 등을 주제로 한다. 다수의 워크숍이 함께 열려 관련 분야의 최신 동향을 폭넓게 파악할 수 있으며, 병렬/분산 처리 분야의 주요 학회다.
descriptionEn: A major IEEE conference on parallel and distributed processing, covering large-scale parallel algorithms, distributed systems, and HPC applications. It hosts numerous co-located workshops providing broad coverage of current trends, and is a key venue in parallel and distributed processing.
